lesson.title: 新概念英语 - 第1册 - 第105-106课Hello, Mr.boss.您好，老板。

sections.text_en: The Boss: Where's Miss Simpson, Bob? I want her.Bob: Do you want to speak to her, sir?The Boss: Yes, I do. I want her to come to my office. Tell her to come at once.Miss Simpson: Did you want to see me, sir?The Boss: Ah, yes, Miss Simpson. How do you spell“ intelligent”? Can you tell me?Miss Simpson: I-N-T-E-L-L-I-G-E-N-T.The Boss: That's right. You've typed it with only one “L”. This letter's full of mistakes. I want you to type it again.Miss Simpson: Yes, I'll do that. I'm sorry about that.The Boss: And here's a little present for you.Miss Simpson: What is it?The Boss: It's a dictionary. I hope it will help you.
vocab: spell v. 拼写 intelligent adj. 聪明的，有智慧的 mistake n. 错误 present n. 礼物 dictionary n. 词典
sections.text_cn: 老 板：鲍勃，Simpson在哪儿？我要找她。鲍 勃：您要同她谈话吗？老 板：是的，我要她到我的办公室来。叫她马上就来。Simpson：您找我吗？老 板：啊，是的，Simpson。"intelligent" 怎样拼写？你能告诉我吗？Simpson：I-N-T-E-L-L-I-G-E-N-T。老 板：对的。但你只打了1个“L”。 这封信里错误百出。我要你重打一遍。Simpson：是，我重打。对此我感到很抱歉。老 板：这里有一件小礼物送你。Simpson：是什么？老 板：是本词典。我希望它能对你有所帮助。
